title: CX context — switch categories drinks to pizzas — natural transition
notes: Customer asks for drinks, then switches to pizzas. Bot handles the switch naturally without losing state or opening a cart. State stays BROWSING_MENU throughout.

llm.message: Here are our drinks! We have Coca-Cola (330ml), Coca-Cola (500ml), Sprite (330ml), Still Water, and Ice Coffee. What sounds good?
We don't have pizza, but I can suggest our amazing burgers or sides instead!
